case_title: MATANUSKA ELECTRIC ASSOCIATION, INC., VS. CHESTER P. COLEMAN

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MATANUSKA ELECTRIC ASSOCIATION, INC.
